# Saffron of Kashmir

> Premium Kashmiri Mongra saffron harvested in Pampore, Kashmir. Supplying the UAE since 2004.

## Pages

- [Home](https://saffronofkashmir.com/): Products, ordering information, FAQ, and the brand story.
- [Products](https://saffronofkashmir.com/products.html): Full product catalogue — Mongra saffron tins, saffron honey, saffron oil, and Kashmiri Kahwa blend.
- [Recipes](https://saffronofkashmir.com/recipes.html): Tested saffron recipes including Kashmiri Kahwa, Zafrani Pulao, Kesar Doodh, Arabic Machboos, Saffron Panna Cotta, and Saffron Lemonade.
- [Blog](https://saffronofkashmir.com/blogs.html): Guides on Mongra saffron grades, purity testing, Pampore heritage, Arabic cuisine, and research-backed health benefits.
